articles.title: 'Hoping to Fool the American People': In Dead of Night, GOP Sets Vote on Trump Fed Pick - Common Dreams
articles.description: "No Republican claiming to care about Fed independence should support moving forward the nomination of Kevin Warsh," said Sen. Elizabeth Warren.

articles.title: US military strike on alleged drug boat kills 2 in eastern Pacific - AP News
